abilities.name: Psylink
abilities.text: Sabrina's Alakazam always has a copy of every attack your Psychic Pokémon in play have (including their Energy costs and anything else required in order to use those attacks, such as discarding Energy cards). abilities.name: Frenzied Escape
abilities.text: When Doduo retreats, hold this card and throw it, because Doduo is running away. Throw the card horizontally with a snap to get the furthest distance!

attacks.name: Harmonize
attacks.text: From the moment you use this attack, you must begin to sing a song. (While the song is being sung, the game continues.) When the song is finished, this attack does 30 damage.
